purpose: Static map of WebBlocks UI knowledge sources for AI agents and future export tooling. This manifest does not create or reference a live vector store.

root_docs.description: Repository overview, entry points, notes, and high-level project identity.
Canonical root integration and layout rules, including AI enforcement behavior.
Canonical pattern-first guidance for common screens and compositions.
Primitive, surface, utility, and component vocabulary reference.
Project roadmap, including future AI knowledge and advisor phases.

package_docs.description: Shipped package usage details and package-level entry points.
Package-level integration rules for consumers of shipped WebBlocks UI assets.

package_source.description: Canonical source CSS for foundations, layout, primitives, patterns, utilities, and icons.
Canonical source JavaScript for shipped hooks and runtime behavior.

package_dist.description: Shipped CSS consumed by production and CDN integrations.
Shipped icon CSS consumed by production and CDN integrations.
Shipped JavaScript consumed by production and CDN integrations.
Maintained icon registry artifact for icon pickers and catalog sync.

html_docs.description: Pattern examples and canonical pattern navigation.
Admin page, list, detail, action column, and danger-zone standards.
Admin, auth, and sidebar product brand mark rules.

ai_contract.description: AI knowledge layer overview, reading order, and source-of-truth rules.
Canonical downstream AI contract source published into versioned dist artifacts.
Role and behavior contract for a WebBlocks UI expert agent.
Rules for downstream projects consuming WebBlocks UI.
Checklist for reviewing downstream UI changes.
Forbidden downstream vocabulary, wrappers, overlay patterns, and framework UI layers.
Preferred answer structure for WebBlocks UI advisor responses.
Compact correct and incorrect usage examples for common downstream UI cases.
Copyable WebBlocks UI usage block for downstream AGENTS.md or equivalent AI context files.
Manually readable manifest for future knowledge export or vector-store preparation.
